title: moogs_structures:mirroring_single_pool_element
description: A single pool element that applies a mirror transformation when placing the structure template.

location.description: Namespaced resource location pointing to the NBT structure file (e.g. 'mymod:village/house').

mirror.description: Mirror axis applied when placing the structure template.

processors.description: Processor list applied to the structure template. Follows vanilla single_pool_element processor list format.

projection.description: How the structure is placed relative to terrain.
